notable_excerpts: Our priority at this point of time is to create digital interface and put health data to use for users as well as payers or insurers and providers.

This operating result, we believe displays Bajaj General's commitment to a balanced and profitable growth on the back of a deep and a broad distribution along with prudent underwriting, while focusing on best-in-class customer service.
As required by regulation, BFS prepares its financials in compliance with the Indian Accounting Standards, (IndAS).
I am happy to confirm that necessary approvals for the acquisition have been received, namely from CCI, IRDAI.

chain_of_thought: The transcript lacks environmental disclosures entirely. Social aspects are minimally covered, focusing on customer service and healthcare stakeholder engagement. Governance is moderately addressed with mentions of regulatory compliance and financial transparency.
